feature: Remote Agent Transport — WebSocket over SSH with SpacetimeDB Coordination
status_note: Implemented in a4f2799. Remaining work consolidated into feat-remote-agent-remaining.json.
description: Enable hex agents to run code generation on local and remote servers via WebSocket-over-SSH transport, with SpacetimeDB for coordination and inference server access

steps.title: Define domain types: RemoteAgent, TunnelHandle, AgentMessage, CodeGenRequest/Response, AgentCapabilities
steps.notes: Pure value types — no external deps. AgentMessage is the WebSocket protocol envelope.

steps.title: Define port interfaces: ISshTunnelPort, IAgentTransportPort, IRemoteRegistryPort, IInferenceRouterPort
steps.notes: Ports depend only on domain types. ISshTunnelPort uses SshTunnelConfig + TunnelHandle. IAgentTransportPort handles WebSocket message send/recv.

steps.title: Implement SSH tunnel adapter using russh — connect, health check, reconnect, disconnect
steps.notes: Pure Rust SSH2. Key-based auth + ssh-agent. Keepalive every 15s. Exponential backoff reconnect (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, max 60s). Returns local forwarded port for WS to connect through.

steps.title: Implement WebSocket transport adapter over SSH tunnel using tokio-tungstenite
steps.notes: Connects WS to localhost:<forwarded-port>. Serializes/deserializes AgentMessage. Handles binary framing for large code gen results. StreamChunk for partial results.

steps.title: Add SpacetimeDB tables: remote_agents, inference_servers, code_gen_tasks
steps.notes: New WASM module. Tables: RemoteAgent (agent_id PK, status, capabilities_json, last_heartbeat), InferenceServer (server_id PK, agent_id FK, models_json, current_load), CodeGenTask (task_id PK, assigned_agent_id, status, request/result JSON).

steps.title: Add SpacetimeDB reducers: register_remote_agent, update_heartbeat, assign_task, complete_task, reassign_task
steps.notes: Reducers handle state transitions. reassign_task triggered when agent goes stale (no heartbeat for 45s). complete_task stores result_json and sets completed_at timestamp.

steps.title: Implement remote agent registry adapter — wraps SpacetimeDB subscriptions for discovery, health, capacity
steps.notes: Implements IRemoteRegistryPort. Subscribes to remote_agents + inference_servers tables. Exposes async streams for agent status changes. Caches last-known state locally.

steps.title: Implement agent lifecycle adapter — spawn, heartbeat, task assignment, result collection, dead agent reclamation
steps.notes: Composes ISshTunnelPort + IAgentTransportPort + IRemoteRegistryPort. Heartbeat protocol: Ping/Pong every 15s, stale at 45s, dead at 120s. On dead: call reassign_task reducer for all assigned tasks.

steps.title: Extend secrets adapter for secure credential forwarding to remote agents over SSH tunnel
steps.notes: Secrets travel encrypted inside SSH tunnel. Never stored on remote disk. Per-session scoped — revoked when agent disconnects. Uses existing hex secrets infrastructure (ADR-026).

steps.title: Implement inference router adapter — model availability, load-based routing, locality preference
steps.notes: Routing priority: (1) model availability, (2) current load < 0.8, (3) network locality (prefer local for <1K token tasks), (4) project affinity. Fallback chain: remote GPU → local → direct LLM bridge → error.

steps.title: Implement remote agent orchestrator use case — coordination, routing, fallback, result aggregation
steps.notes: Pure business logic. Depends only on ports. Routes CodeGenRequest to best agent via IInferenceRouterPort. Handles fallback on disconnect. Aggregates StreamChunks into final CodeGenResult.

steps.title: Add CLI commands: hex agent connect, hex agent list, hex agent spawn-remote, hex agent disconnect, hex agent info
steps.notes: connect: runs on remote machine, connects WS to nexus. spawn-remote: runs from control plane, SSH into remote + start hex-agent. list: shows all agents with status/host/models. info: detailed agent view with task history.

steps.title: Add Nexus dashboard components: RemoteAgentPanel, InferenceServerList, TaskRoutingView
steps.notes: React components in existing Nexus dashboard. SpacetimeDB subscriptions for real-time updates. Show agent status (online/busy/stale/dead), connected models, task assignments, and inference load.

steps.title: Update composition root — wire all remote agent adapters, register routes, configure SpacetimeDB subscriptions
steps.notes: New routes: GET /api/agents, POST /api/agents/connect, DELETE /api/agents/:id, POST /api/agents/:id/route. Wire ISshTunnelPort → SshTunnelAdapter, IAgentTransportPort → WsTransportAdapter, etc. Feature-flag: --enable-remote-agents (off by default for first release).

cargo.name: russh
cargo.purpose: Pure Rust SSH2 client — tunnel management

cargo.name: russh-keys
cargo.purpose: SSH key parsing and agent auth

riskRegister.risk: russh edge cases with non-standard SSH key formats
riskRegister.mitigation: Start with ssh-agent auth (delegates to OS), add direct key support incrementally

riskRegister.risk: SSH tunnel silent drops on unstable networks
riskRegister.mitigation: Aggressive keepalive (15s) + reconnect with exponential backoff. SpacetimeDB heartbeat as secondary liveness check

riskRegister.risk: SpacetimeDB subscription scaling with 10+ concurrent agents
riskRegister.mitigation: Load test with simulated fleet before production; scope subscriptions per-swarm not global

riskRegister.risk: Secret leakage if SSH tunnel compromised
riskRegister.mitigation: Per-session nonces, secret access logging, auto-revoke on disconnect

mergeOrder: T1-1 → T1-2 (SSH tunnel before WS transport)
T2-1 → T2-2 → T2-3 (SpacetimeDB tables → reducers → registry adapter)
T3-1 → T3-2 → T3-3 → T3-4 (lifecycle → secrets → routing → orchestrator)
T4-1, T4-2 parallel → T4-3 last (CLI + dashboard → composition root)
successCriteria: hex agent spawn-remote user@host connects via SSH tunnel and registers in SpacetimeDB
hex agent list shows both local and remote agents with real-time status
Code gen task routed to remote GPU agent, partial results stream back to dashboard
Remote agent disconnect triggers automatic task reassignment within 120s
All secrets forwarded over SSH, never persisted on remote disk
Dashboard shows live agent fleet with model availability and load metrics
